Class Mission

java.lang.Object
model.Mission
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Mission extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an actual drone delivery mission.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Mission(DeliveryRequest request, Drone drone, Route route)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addHistoryEvent(String event)
    Appends an event to the mission history log.
    void
    cancel()
    Cancels the mission and makes the drone available again.
    void
    complete()
    Completes the mission: sets status to DELIVERED.
    void
    confirmReception(MedicalStaff staff)
    Confirms that the organ has been received by a medical staff member.
    double
    getBatteryLevel()
    Returns the current battery level (0-100).
    Position
    getCurrentPosition()
    Returns the current position of the drone during the mission.
    Drone
    getDrone()
    Returns the drone assigned to this mission.
    List<String>
    getHistory()
    Returns the full event history of the mission.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the unique mission identifier.
    PriorityLevel
    getPriorityLevel()
    Returns the priority level of the associated request.
    DeliveryRequest
    getRequest()
    Returns the delivery request linked to this mission.
    Route
    getRoute()
    Returns the planned route for this mission.
    MissionStatus
    getStatus()
    Returns the current mission status.
    boolean
    isReceptionConfirmed()
    Returns true if the hospital has confirmed reception of the organ.
    void
    start()
    Starts the mission: sets status to IN_PROGRESS and records start time.
    void
    updateTracking(Position position, double batteryLevel, double organTemperature, double shockLevel)
    Updates live tracking data during the mission.

  • Constructor Details

    • Mission

      public Mission(DeliveryRequest request, Drone drone, Route route)

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the mission: sets status to IN_PROGRESS and records start time.

    • complete

      public void complete()
      Completes the mission: sets status to DELIVERED.

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels the mission and makes the drone available again.

    • confirmReception

      public void confirmReception(MedicalStaff staff)
      Confirms that the organ has been received by a medical staff member.
      Parameters:
      staff - the staff member who received the delivery

    • updateTracking

      public void updateTracking(Position position, double batteryLevel, double organTemperature, double shockLevel)
      Updates live tracking data during the mission.
      Parameters:
      position - current drone position
      batteryLevel - current battery level (0-100)
      organTemperature - temperature of the organ container
      shockLevel - vibration/shock level recorded

    • addHistoryEvent

      public void addHistoryEvent(String event)
      Appends an event to the mission history log.
      Parameters:
      event - description of the event

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique mission identifier.
      Returns:
      mission ID

    • getRequest

      public DeliveryRequest getRequest()
      Returns the delivery request linked to this mission.
      Returns:
      delivery request

    • getDrone

      public Drone getDrone()
      Returns the drone assigned to this mission.
      Returns:
      assigned drone

    • getRoute

      public Route getRoute()
      Returns the planned route for this mission.
      Returns:
      mission route

    • getStatus

      public MissionStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current mission status.
      Returns:
      mission status

    • getPriorityLevel

      public PriorityLevel getPriorityLevel()
      Returns the priority level of the associated request.
      Returns:
      priority level

    • isReceptionConfirmed

      public boolean isReceptionConfirmed()
      Returns true if the hospital has confirmed reception of the organ.
      Returns:
      true if reception confirmed

    • getHistory

      public List<String> getHistory()
      Returns the full event history of the mission.
      Returns:
      list of history events

    • getCurrentPosition

      public Position getCurrentPosition()
      Returns the current position of the drone during the mission.
      Returns:
      current drone position

    • getBatteryLevel

      public double getBatteryLevel()
      Returns the current battery level (0-100).
      Returns:
      battery level as percentage
